overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player moving from an interior room through a dark corridor and onto an elevated exterior walkway overlooking a dense futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers and neon billboards. The atmosphere is characteristic of the game's cyberpunk aesthetic with hazy skies and artificial neon lighting.

agents.ego_description: standing by the window looking out at the cityscape and flying traffic

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle moving past the window in the distance

entered.detail: large window with hexagonal wire mesh pattern overlooking the city
futuristic flying car visible through the window against the city backdrop
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers visible through the window

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a high-rise room with a large hexagonal-mesh window overlooking a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape. A flying vehicle passes by in the distance as the camera remains near the window, observing the urban landscape outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark interior corridor with neon accent lighting

events.description: moves away from the window into a darker corridor with minimal lighting
approaches and exits the building onto an exterior balcony

agents.ego_description: moving through a dark corridor toward an exit door

entered.detail: dark metallic corridor walls with minimal texture
vertical strip of green neon lighting along the wall
metal handrail along the left side of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a dimly lit interior corridor with dark metal walls and green neon accent lighting. The space is narrow and enclosed, leading toward an exit to the exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated exterior walkway with glass railings overlooking the city

events.description: exits the building onto an elevated exterior balcony with city views

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated exterior walkway, observing the cyberpunk cityscape

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle moving between the skyscrapers in the distance

entered.detail: transparent glass and metal railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
large purple neon advertisement on the side of a distant building
tall glass and steel skyscraper with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an elevated exterior walkway with glass railings overlooking the dense cyberpunk city. The camera moves forward along the walkway, revealing towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon billboards against a hazy dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway passing commercial billboards and advertisements

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated walkway past various neon advertisements

entered.detail: bright cyan neon sign reading 'CONGRESS & MILK' on the building facade
multiple large digital screens displaying advertisements on building faces

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the elevated walkway, passing a prominent cyan neon sign reading 'CONGRESS & MILK' and various other digital billboards attached to the surrounding skyscrapers. The environment is dense with vertical architecture and glowing advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway approaching a distinctive industrial archway structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward and passing a large distinctive building with an archway structure

entered.detail: large industrial building with a prominent archway structure and red-brown metal facade
tall building with industrial architecture and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera approaching a distinctive industrial building with a large archway structure. The architecture shifts to more industrial styling with exposed metal and geometric patterns as the walkway continues through the dense urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded high-rise interior out into the sprawling, neon-drenched expanse of a futuristic cityscape. It begins inside a room by a hexagonal-mesh window, observing a flying vehicle drift past the distant urban skyline. The camera then retreats from the view to move through a narrow, dimly lit corridor defined by dark metal walls and green neon accents before emerging onto an elevated exterior walkway. As the space opens up, the camera glides past glass railings and towering skyscrapers under a hazy dusk sky, passing a prominent cyan neon sign for Congress & Milk and various glowing digital billboards. The scene finally shifts toward a more industrial aesthetic, approaching a large archway structure and exposed metal geometry within the dense urban canyon.
